_notes: Hand-curated by walking the US Core DiagnosticReport-Lab differential (10 elements) against the R4 DiagnosticReport snapshot (32 elements). Verified with PowerShell against actual profile JSON files. Covers: 3 cardinality increases, new invariants us-core-8/us-core-9, binding version pin removal, binding strength/VS changes, slicing introduction with mandatory LaboratorySlice, and reference profile narrowing.

drifts.description: Constraint 'us-core-8' added (severity: error): effective[x] SHALL be present if the status is 'partial', 'preliminary', 'final', 'amended', 'corrected' or 'appended'. Not present in R4 base DiagnosticReport.

Constraint 'us-core-9' added (severity: error): issued SHALL be present if the status is 'partial', 'preliminary', 'final', 'amended', 'corrected' or 'appended'. Not present in R4 base DiagnosticReport.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'diagnostic-report-status|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'diagnostic-report-status' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one category becomes mandatory in US Core Lab profile.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Slicing added to DiagnosticReport.category (discriminator: pattern:$this, rules: open). Enforces that specific category codes must be present. Not present in R4 base.
Mandatory slice 'LaboratorySlice' added with cardinality [1..1]. Requires the category to include the LOINC code 26436-6 (Laboratory). There is no corresponding element in R4 base.
MustSupport added on mandatory slice LaboratorySlice (min=1 -> conformance-critical).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).

Binding changed: R4 uses preferred strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/report-codes. US Core changes to extensible strength and constrains to http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-laboratory-test-codes (US-specific lab test codes).
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Subject becomes mandatory; R4 allows a report without a subject.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profiles narrowed: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group|Device|Location). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient) only.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). Note: constraint us-core-8 makes it conditionally required at runtime.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). Note: constraint us-core-9 makes it conditionally required at runtime.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Reference target profiles constrained: R4 allows Reference(Practitioner|PractitionerRole|Organization|CareTeam). US Core restricts to US Core profiles: Reference(us-core-practitioner|us-core-organization|us-core-careteam|us-core-practitionerrole).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Observation). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-observation-lab), enforcing that results must conform to the US Core lab observation profile.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.status in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.category in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.category:LaboratorySlice in target profile. Marks this slice as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement. No equivalent element in R4 base.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.code in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.subject in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.effective[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.issued in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.performer in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to DiagnosticReport.result in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
